description.en: Clear values from a range in a Google Sheet. Formatting is preserved.
description.de: Lösche Werte aus einem Bereich eines Google Sheets. Formatierung bleibt erhalten.
description.es: Clear values from a range in a Google Sheet. Formatting is preserved.
description.fr: Clear values from a range in a Google Sheet. Formatting is preserved.
description.ro: Clear values from a range in a Google Sheet. Formatting is preserved.
description.it: Clear values from a range in a Google Sheet. Formatting is preserved.

description.en: The A1 notation of the range to clear (e.g., 'Sheet1!A1:C3').
description.es: The A1 notation of the range to clear (e.g., 'Sheet1!A1:C3').
